'''Krall Praget''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Edatha]] circa [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. Praget chaired the [[Council on Security and Intelligence]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], and was still on the council advising the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. During the war, a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] aide of his collaborated with the invaders.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
